name: sentinel
description: Sentinel — 9-category unified intelligence plugin. Consolidates code review, AI dev toolkit, output styles, browser testing, workflow memory, frontend design, documentation, infrastructure, and DX tools into one robust system.

output_style.description: Active output style injected at session start

churn_threshold.description: Number of edits to the same file before churn warning fires

confidence_threshold.description: Review agent confidence threshold (lower = more findings)

memory_enabled.description: Whether to inject past session learnings at SessionStart

a11y_wcag_level.description: WCAG conformance level for accessibility audits
